  "actions": [
    "Reject the staged undersized overload heaters/relays",
    "Calculate correct overload sizing based on motor nameplate Full-Load Amps (FLA) and Service Factor (SF) per NEC Art. 430 Part III",

  "rationale": "Staging undersized motor overloads is a non-compliant condition that will lead to nuisance tripping or, if bypassed, motor burnout and fire hazards. Overload protection must be sized strictly in accordance with NEC Article 430, Part III, based on the motor nameplate FLA and Service Factor.",

    "NEC Section 430.32"
  ]
